description: apcore exception -> JSON-RPC error parity (Algorithm A-ERR). The runner reconstructs the apcore exception from `input`, calls ErrorMapper.to_jsonrpc_error, asserts the code, and asserts message contains/excludes substrings. Codes per docs/spec/srs.md FR-ERR-* and the README error-code table.

error_cases.description: ACLDeniedError -> -32001 (TaskNotFound) with caller and module suppressed (NFR-SEC-003).
ModuleExecuteError -> -32603 with the fixed message; original text never surfaced.
An unrecognized exception -> -32603 with the same fixed generic message as ModuleExecuteError, and no raw detail.

known_divergences: Message wording reconciled 2026-06-02: both ModuleExecuteError and any unrecognized exception emit the fixed string "Internal server error" (-32603). All three SDKs already produce this via their catch-all arm (no explicit MODULE_EXECUTE_ERROR branch); docs (srs FR-ERR-008, prd, tech-design) were aligned to match. "Internal error" remains only as the JSON-RPC standard NAME of code -32603, never as the emitted message.
ModuleTimeoutError maps to message "Execution timeout" (-32603) standalone, and to a FAILED task on the streaming/server path; the streaming form is covered by streaming_events.json.
